text: Gold Falls as Trump Threatens Escalation of US Attacks on Iran - Bloomberg.com
fullText: Gold extended a decline as the escalating war in the Middle East heightened energy-supply and inflation risks, while a surprise drop in US jobless claims also reduced prospects for an interest-rate cut.

text: Trading Open Shadowed by Trump Escalation Threats: Markets Wrap - Bloomberg.com
fullText: Equities extended their gains as dip buyers emerged on optimism that Iran and the US may be able to prevent further escalation of the conflict.

text: Huff scores 3 as West Virginia tops Oklahoma for CBC title - ESPN
fullText: West Virginia beat Oklahoma 89-82 in overtime on Sunday to win the College Basketball Crown Tournament championship.

text: Paramount Nears Deal Securing Gulf State Funds To Back WBD Acquisition – Report - Deadline
fullText: Paramount Skydance seems to be nearing a deal to secure funding from three Gulf nation sovereign wealth funds to back its proposed acquisition of WBD.

text: Trump threatens Iran with ‘Hell’ over Strait of Hormuz in profane post - The Washington Post
fullText: Trump escalated threats against Iran’s power plants, bridges and other infrastructure in an expletive-laden post on Truth Social on Easter morning.

text: Artemis II hits ‘two thirds’ mark on moon journey, shares new lunar photos: ‘History in the making’ - Fox News
fullText: Artemis II astronauts are nearing the moon for what will be a six-hour, non-stop lunar flyby that may reveal fresh images of the dark side of the moon.

text: RAM pop-up clinics provide free medical, dental, and vision care to uninsured or underinsured Americans - CBS News
fullText: A nonprofit called RAM is bringing free health care to Americans who need it. Some patients wait days and sleep in their cars in order to get dental, vision, and medical treatment at RAM clinics.

text: Study Reveals the Single Cause of Cognitive Decline—and a Cure - inc.com
fullText: Researchers pinpoint a lone protein that speeds up the dysfunction of an aging brain. Eliminating it, they claim, can reverse the damage.

text: Tori Spelling and seven children taken to hospital after car accident - NBC News
fullText: Tori Spelling and several children were taken to the hospital following a car crash last week, the actor’s spokesperson confirmed to NBC News

text: Previewing Michigan's national championship game vs UConn: Hail Yes! podcast - Detroit Free Press
fullText: The "Hail Yes!" crew went live to break down Michigan's dominant win over Arizona in the Final Four and the matchup against UConn.

text: Artemis II astronauts find hidden eggs on Easter Sunday as they close in on the moon - CBS News
Savannah Guthrie Shares Easter Message Amid Her Mom's Disappearance - Variety
fullText: Savannah Guthrie joined a digital Easter gathering on Sunday morning to share a message of hope amid her mother’s unsolved abduction.

text: Pope calls for peace, Trump vows hell for Iran on Easter - Axios
fullText: The pope and a top military bishop both preached peace.

text: 4 killed in Alabama car crash during pursuit by state trooper - CBS News
fullText: The driver was trying to elude the Alabama Law Enforcement Agency's highway patrol on a rural road in southeast Alabama's Pike County when the crash occurred late Friday night.

text: ‘Whole region is going to burn’: Iran's ‘living hell’ warning to US amid Donald Trump's threats of striking power plants | World News - Hindustan Times
fullText: Iran's parliament speaker, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, said the "only real solution is respecting the rights of Iranian people and ending this dangerous game". | World News
